access_token.description: Zoho OAuth access token. Sent as the Authorization header with a 'Zoho-oauthtoken ' prefix; never logged.

base_url.description: Zoho Desk API base URL override for tests or region-specific data centers.

org_id.description: Optional Zoho Desk organization ID; sent as the orgId header on every request when set.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
